name: Root Nutrient Uptake Process
description: Root Nutrient Uptake Process in Plants. This process represents a higher-level biological mechanism distinct from molecular/biochemical processes covered in GLMP.
mermaid:
graph TD
    A32[Soil Nutrients] --> B32[Root Hair Contact]
    B32 --> C32[Ion Exchange]
    C32 --> D32[Active Transport]
    D32 --> E32[Symplastic Pathway]
    D32 --> F32[Apoplastic Pathway]
    E32 --> G32[Xylem Loading]
    F32 --> G32
    G32 --> H32[Upward Transport]
    
    style A32 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style B32 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style C32 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style D32 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style E32 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style F32 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style G32 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style H32 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: Programming Framework: A Universal Process Visualization Methodology
sources.notes: Higher-level biological process visualization: Root Nutrient Uptake Process. Created using the Programming Framework methodology for organismal and ecological process analysis.

sources.title: Nutrient uptake by plants: a root's perspective

notes: Higher-level biological process. GLMP covers biochemical/molecular processes; this database covers organismal/ecological processes.
